englishDefinitions: (slang, derogatory, sometimes affectionately, humorous) A person with poor judgment and taste; a foolish or silly person.
persianTranslation: (عامیانه، تحقیرآمیز، گاهی محبت آمیز، طنزآمیز) فردی که قضاوت و سلیقه ضعیفی دارد. یک فرد احمق یا احمق
examples: Stocks Genius or Dot-Com Doofus? – Wired News

2005 October 17, Kevin Amorin, Mewsday, quoted in 2007, Troth Wells, T-Shirt, page 14,
Being too young to attend a show on Bowie's 1983 Serious Moonlight tour, I did what any underage doofus would do. I bought a concert T-shirt – three-quarter-length blue sleeves, image of Major Tom himself on the front.
